    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    H

    handleMove() - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameManager
    Handles each move by checking if the game has been won, if not it switches the turns.
    HelpCommand - Class in scorefour.commands
    The HelpCommand lists all available Command's and their descriptions.
    HelpCommand(List<Command>) - Constructor for class scorefour.commands.HelpCommand
    Gives HelpCommand access to a list of all available Command's.
    HumanPlayer - Class in scorefour.player
    Represents a Player who is human.
    HumanPlayer(BeadColour) - Constructor for class scorefour.player.HumanPlayer
    Constructs a new HumanPlayer for the game.
